mapper.sql: t.ticket_id, t.user_id, u.real_name AS user_name, u.phone AS user_phone, t.order_id, o.merchant_id AS merchant_id, COALESCE(mi.store_name, mu.real_name) AS merchant_name, t.admin_id, a.real_name AS admin_name, t.type, t.title, t.status, t.priority, ( SELECT m.content FROM customer_service_message m WHERE m.ticket_id = t.ticket_id ORDER BY m.create_time DESC, m.message_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS last_message, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM customer_service_message m WHERE m.ticket_id = t.ticket_id ) AS message_count, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM customer_service_message m WHERE m.ticket_id = t.ticket_id AND m.is_read = 0 ) AS unread_count, t.create_time, t.update_time, t.close_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO customer_service_ticket (user_id, order_id, admin_id, type, title, status, priority, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{orderId}, #{adminId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{status}, #{priority}, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO customer_service_message (ticket_id, sender_id, sender_role, content, content_type, is_read, create_time) VALUES (#{ticketId}, #{senderId}, #{senderRole}, #{content}, #{contentType}, #{isRead}, NOW())
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM customer_service_ticket t LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.user_id = t.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user a ON a.user_id = t.admin_id LEFT JOIN delivery_order o ON o.order_id = t.order_id LEFT JOIN merchant_info mi ON mi.merchant_id = o.merchant_id LEFT JOIN sys_user mu ON mu.user_id = o.merchant_id WHERE 1 = 1
AND t.status = #{status}
AND ( t.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CAST(t.ticket_id AS CHAR) = #{keyword} OR CAST(t.order_id AS CHAR) = #{keyword} )
ORDER BY FIELD(t.status, 0, 1, 2, 3), t.update_time DESC, t.ticket_id DESC

SELECT
FROM customer_service_ticket t LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.user_id = t.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user a ON a.user_id = t.admin_id LEFT JOIN delivery_order o ON o.order_id = t.order_id LEFT JOIN merchant_info mi ON mi.merchant_id = o.merchant_id LEFT JOIN sys_user mu ON mu.user_id = o.merchant_id WHERE t.ticket_id = #{ticketId} AND t.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM customer_service_ticket t LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.user_id = t.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user a ON a.user_id = t.admin_id LEFT JOIN delivery_order o ON o.order_id = t.order_id LEFT JOIN merchant_info mi ON mi.merchant_id = o.merchant_id LEFT JOIN sys_user mu ON mu.user_id = o.merchant_id WHERE t.ticket_id = #{ticketId} LIMIT 1

SELECT m.message_id, m.ticket_id, m.sender_id, m.sender_role, su.real_name AS sender_name, m.content, m.content_type, m.is_read, m.create_time FROM customer_service_message m LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON su.user_id = m.sender_id WHERE m.ticket_id = #{ticketId} ORDER BY m.create_time ASC, m.message_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE customer_service_ticket SET admin_id = #{adminId}, status = CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE status END, update_time = NOW() WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId} AND admin_id IS NULL

UPDATE customer_service_ticket SET status = #{status}, admin_id = #{adminId}, update_time = NOW(), close_time = CASE WHEN #{status} IN (2, 3) THEN NOW() ELSE close_time END WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId}
